title: Whispering Wires
writer: William M. Conselman, Henry Leverage, Kate L. McLaurin
actors: Anita Stewart, Edmund Burns, Charles Clary
plot: A whispering voice over the telephone foretells a murder to occur at a specified time. Another occurs on schedule. The heroine, Doris Stockbridge, is then threatened, but she is saved through the ingenuity of her sweetheart, Barry...
